data.content: Implementation review approved. Code changes (version-badge.tsx, version-badge.stories.tsx) satisfy all acceptance criteria: clicking the version pill triggers an update check via /api/version?force=1, shows 'Update now to {version}' when an update is available (as a link to GitHub releases), and shows 'Latest version installed' when current. Storybook interaction tests cover both click-driven outcomes. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 2251 tests, build). No security issues or regressions found.
